title: Expand retrieval before picking the payments incident runbook
description: Fix resolve_runbook_slug so prod payments customer-impact incidents use payments-prod-incident. The first retrieval pass should be too narrow and require coordinator-led expansion.

patch_hints.new:
if normalized_team == "payments" and environment == "prod":
        return "payments-prod-customer" if is_customer_impacting else "payments-prod"

if normalized_team == "payments" and environment == "prod":
        return "payments-prod-incident" if is_customer_impacting else "payments-prod"
